subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Sun desired to send unto thee a light from among its lights in the form of the words of God and divine fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الشمس ارادت ان ترسل الیک نورا من انوارها علی هیئته کلمات الله و نفحات
